contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 50
- Description: White-label PR1: repair registration (B1) and post-payment receipt (B2)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/184
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/667
  
  Details:
  The two showstoppers that made the shipped white-label funnel unusable end-to-end. Both only reproduce through interaction or a specific URL, which is why the original UAT spec (page-load assertions only) passed while the funnel was dead - the base64ToArrayBuffer postmortem in OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS section 10 repeating itself.
  
  B1 - registration dead-ended into an empty card. handleAuth() wrote to #wl-auth-loading, an element that never existed, throwing a TypeError between hide(form) and show(verify). The catch wrote the error into #wl-auth-error, a child of the form it had just hidden, so the error was invisible too. Fixed: dropped the phantom write; moved #wl-auth-error out of the form so errors are readable exactly when the form is hidden; re-show the form on failure so the retry button is reachable; echo the address back so users catch their own typos; routed every write to the verify message through one owner, built from DOM nodes rather than innerHTML.
  
  B2 - after paying, the customer saw 'No designs yet. Upload your first one above.' Two IIFEs raced: one showed the receipt, the other ran initAuth() which for any returning visitor reaches showGallery() and hid it. Measured gone by 500ms, so unreachable in production. Fixed: collapsed both into one init router with mutually exclusive branches; the receipt returns early and comes first.
  
  B14 (found while establishing a no-uncaught-errors invariant) - white-label/index.html never loaded cart.js, so universal-nav's injected cart-ui.js called window.Cart.getItemCount() on an undefined object and threw on every single page load. Every other page loads cart.js explicitly. One script tag.
  
  Tests: new tests/white-label-auth-receipt.spec.ts, verified fails-first (5 of 8 failed pre-fix, all 8 pass after). Drives the real handlers rather than asserting on a loaded page, and includes a structural guard that the error element is never again nested inside the form it reports on. Full white-label suite 34/34 green.
  
  The funnel now works end-to-end for the first time. Plan updated: PR1 done, RESUME moved to PR2.
  
  Merged: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/184 and https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/667
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 83.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
